title: 10 PCS Artificial Pine Picks Christmas Pine Cones Berry Stems for Christmas Decorations, Crafts, Wreath, Garland
features: Package: You will 10 pieces of artificial pine picks which consist of holly berries and pine cones.
Material: They are made from high quality PVC material. It's durable and lightweight. They could be used for a long time.
Size: The length of pine twigs is about 8 cm, which is fit for decorating Christmas trees and wreath.
Design: Artificial pine picks look like real. Bright colour and chic appearance.
Christmas Decoration: The pine picks are perfect for wreath making kit. You could make a luxurious wreath for your Christmas day with these.
description: Product Description Great Decor for Christmas decoration - Artificial Pine Picks with berries, Christmas Wreath accessories Specifications: Material: PVC Design: green pine needles, red berries, brown pine cones. Size: 8 cm long Ideal decoration to highlight festival: You can attach the pine picks to your party, gift. Package includes: 10 * Artificial Pine Picks
